description: An auditor reviews vendor data to identify potential conflicts of interest, such as employees also being vendors.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the master list of all approved vendors and the master list of all current employees.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor has both the vendor and employee datasets.

nodes.task_description: Compare the addresses and bank account numbers in both files to find potential matches.

expected_outcome.value: The analysis identifies two vendors who share a home address with a current employee.

nodes.task_description: Investigate the matches to determine if a true conflict of interest exists and if it was properly disclosed.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor confirms one of the matches is an undisclosed conflict and documents it as a finding.
